testcase.system-err:
It looks like you're using ngModel on the same form field as formControlName. Support for using the ngModel input property and ngModelChange event with reactive form directives has been deprecated in Angular v6 and will be removed in a future version of Angular.
For more information on this, see our API docs here: https://v21.angular.dev/api/forms/FormControlName

ReActStepDetailModalComponent > getToolOperatorAccess / hasOperatorAccess > returns null when the step has no operator access

ReActStepDetailModalComponent > getMessageRoleColor > maps known roles and falls back to default
ReActStepDetailModalComponent > getTextFromMessage > returns empty string when there is no content
ReActStepDetailModalComponent > getTextFromMessage > returns string content directly
ReActStepDetailModalComponent > getTextFromMessage > joins the text parts of array content
ReActStepDetailModalComponent > getToolCallSummaries > returns an empty array for non-array content
ReActStepDetailModalComponent > getToolCallSummaries > summarizes tool-call parts and defaults the operatorId
ReActStepDetailModalComponent > getToolCallStrings (function-call formatting) > renders tool calls as toolName(key=value, ...)
ReActStepDetailModalComponent > getToolCallStrings (function-call formatting) > truncates long string and non-string argument values
ReActStepDetailModalComponent > getToolResultFullItems / getToolResultItems > returns [] for non-array content
